subject: An invitation to submit to BMC Structural Biology
body:
BMC Structural Biology
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/sites/1001/images/logo.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIl&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G  Impact
Factor
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/images/impact/1001.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIm&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G
Follow us on twitter
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/imagerepository/20141022/Follow-us-on-Twitter_100_28.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIn&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G
Executive Editor
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIo&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]:
Catherine Potenski
View all BMC Structural Biology editorial sections here
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIp&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G].

Submit a manuscript
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIq&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
Editorial Board
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIr&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
Author Instructions
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIs&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
Article Alerts
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIt&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]

Dear Dr epstein,

BMC Structural Biology is an open access, peer-reviewed journal that considers
articles on investigations into the structure of biological macromolecules,
including solving structures, structural and functional analyses, and
computational modeling.

We thought you might be interested in the following articles recently published
in the journal:

Crystal structures of IspF from Plasmodium falciparum
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/imagerepository/20141201-images/chrystal.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIu&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G
Crystal structures of IspF from Plasmodium falciparum and Burkholderia
cenocepacia: comparisons inform antimicrobial drug target assessment
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIv&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
O’Rourke PEF, Kalinowska-Tłuścik J, Fyfe PK, Dawson A and Hunter WN


View Full Text
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIw&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View Abstract
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIx&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View PDF
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIy&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]

Characterization of the SAM domain of the PKD-related protein ANKS6
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/imagerepository/20141201-images/SAMdomain.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdIz&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G
Characterization of the SAM domain of the PKD-related protein ANKS6 and its
interaction with ANKS3
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI10&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
Leettola CN, Knight MJ, Cascio D, Hoffman S and Bowie JU


View Full Text
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI11&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View Abstract
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI12&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View PDF
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI13&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]

Synthetic cationic antimicrobial peptides bind with their hydrophobic parts to
drug site II of human serum albumin
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/imagerepository/20141201-images/peptides.gif]http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI14&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G
Synthetic cationic antimicrobial peptides bind with their hydrophobic parts to
drug site II of human serum albumin
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI15&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
Sivertsen A, Isaksson J, Leiros HKS, Svenson J, Svendsen JS and Brandsdal BO


View Full Text
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI16&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View Abstract
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI17&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
View PDF
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI18&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]


Submit
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI19&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
your next manuscript to BMC Structural Biology and take full advantage of:

-
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/graphics/email/images/general/12_01_12_bmcupdate_bullet.gif]
Thorough and constructive peer review handled by scientists in the field -
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/graphics/email/images/general/12_01_12_bmcupdate_bullet.gif]
No space constraints or additional color figure charges -
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/graphics/email/images/general/12_01_12_bmcupdate_bullet.gif]
Inclusion in PubMed and other full-text repositories -
[http://www.biomedcentral.com/graphics/email/images/general/12_01_12_bmcupdate_bullet.gif]
Compliance with open access mandates worldwide including the NIH Public Access
Policy
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1a&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
and the RCUK Open Access Policy
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1b&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]


Visit the website
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1c&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
to find out more about BMC Structural Biology including the journal’s aims and
scope
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1d&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G#aimsscope]
and it's esteemed Editorial Board
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1e&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G].

Best wishes,

Catherine Potenski
Executive Editor, BMC Structural Biology

P.S. Sign up for article alerts
[http://news.springer.com/re?l=D0In5tpwhI6i06dsdI1f&req=utm_campaign%3DBMC00056G]
to keep up to date with the latest news and developments from BMC Structural
Biology.

body_html:
Executive Editor: Catherine Potenski
View all BMC Structural Biology editorial sections here.
Submit a manuscript Editorial Board Author Instructions Article Alerts

Dear Dr epstein,

BMC Structural Biology is an open access, peer-reviewed journal that considers articles on investigations into the structure of biological macromolecules, including solving structures, structural and functional analyses, and computational modeling.

We thought you might be interested in the following articles recently published in the journal:
Crystal structures of IspF from Plasmodium falciparum and Burkholderia cenocepacia: comparisons inform antimicrobial drug target assessment
O’Rourke PEF, Kalinowska-Tłuścik J, Fyfe PK, Dawson A and Hunter WN
View Full Text View Abstract View PDF
Characterization of the SAM domain of the PKD-related protein ANKS6 and its interaction with ANKS3
Leettola CN, Knight MJ, Cascio D, Hoffman S and Bowie JU
View Full Text View Abstract View PDF
Synthetic cationic antimicrobial peptides bind with their hydrophobic parts to drug site II of human serum albumin
Sivertsen A, Isaksson J, Leiros HKS, Svenson J, Svendsen JS and Brandsdal BO
View Full Text View Abstract View PDF

Submit your next manuscript to BMC Structural Biology and take full advantage of:
Thorough and constructive peer review handled by scientists in the field
No space constraints or additional color figure charges
Inclusion in PubMed and other full-text repositories
Compliance with open access mandates worldwide including the NIH Public Access Policy and the RCUK Open Access Policy

Visit the website to find out more about BMC Structural Biology including the journal’s aims and scope and it's esteemed Editorial Board.

Best wishes,

Catherine Potenski
Executive Editor, BMC Structural Biology

P.S. Sign up for article alerts to keep up to date with the latest news and developments from BMC Structural Biology.
